title: Intent Orchestration Object
description: Defines the AI-reasoned pipeline plan generated from a silent source scan and a declared intent goal. The human is the approver of a pre-reasoned data landscape, not an operator of individual mappings.

silentScan.description: AI reads all available source connections and raw data simultaneously before the user takes any action

sourcesScanned.description: All active and staged connections evaluated during the scan

recordDepth.description: How far back this source's data goes. Example: 24 months

identityFields.description: Fields identified as likely identity or join keys

volatilityScore.description: Historical field change frequency observed by AI

identityCollisions.description: Identity fields that collide across sources and require AI resolution

intentDeclaration.description: The goal the architect provides. Used by AI to reason about which flows to construct and what the resulting profile will look like.

goalStatement.description: Plain language goal from the architect
goalStatement.example: Build longitudinal health tracking across all patient touchpoints for continuity of care analysis

successCriteria.description: What a high-quality outcome looks like for this intent
example: Temporal continuity across all event types

orchestrationPlan.description: AI-constructed pipeline plan based on silent scan results and declared intent. Presented to the architect for approval, not construction.

recommendedFlows.description: Ordered list of data flows the AI recommends activating to achieve the stated intent

rationale.description: Why this flow is necessary for the stated intent

profileContribution.description: What this flow adds to the Unified Profile

autoResolved.description: Whether AI resolved all conflicts in this flow without human input

profileIntegrityScore.description: Predicted quality of the Unified Profile if all recommended flows are approved and activated

identityCompleteness.description: Percentage of records with a resolved, non-fragmented identity

temporalCoverage.description: Percentage of the intended time range with sufficient data density

fieldCoverage.description: Percentage of target schema fields that will be populated

conflictResolutionRate.description: Percentage of detected conflicts resolved automatically

scoreJustification.description: Plain language summary of what is driving the score up or down

predictedUnifiedProfile.description: A visual preview of the merged record structure before any ingestion occurs

resolvedIdentityKey.description: The identity key the AI will use after resolving collisions

sampleMergedRecord.description: Representative preview of what a resolved profile record will look like

approvalStatus.description: Architect approval state for the full orchestration plan. Batch approval. Not per-field.

exceptionItems.description: The only items surfaced for human review. AI handles everything else automatically.

metadata.sprintContext: Data Mapping with Intent — POC Day 1 v2
metadata.paradigm: Automated Data Orchestration. Human as approver, not operator.
